channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: A 600-mile road trip (and data) proves EV charging doesn’t suck anymore
item.description: A recent road trip in an EV revealed just how much faster and more reliable DC Fast charging has become in the U.S.

item.title: The Guardian’s Carter Sherman fondly remembers being terrified by Ocarina of Time
item.description: Carter Sherman has been covering sex, gender, and the complex personal and national politics that accompany them for years. She was a senior reporter for Vice and has written for Elle, Ms. magazine, and Los Angeles magazine as well. Along the way, she's garnered a Scripps Howard Award, a National Press Club Journalism Award, and […]

item.title: Apple is putting up prices on Apple Music and Apple One, and says 'rising licensing costs' are to blame — here's how much you'll pay now
item.description: Apple has put up the prices for its music streaming subscription service for the first time in four years.

item.title: Quelle distribution Linux choisir ? Notre comparatif des meilleurs systèmes
item.description: Vous avez franchi le pas et vous voulez passer à Linux ? Pour valider définitivement cette étape, il faut sélectionner un système. Quelle distribution Linux choisir ? Voici notre sélection.

item.title: Surprise! Facial recognition smart locks are actually good
item.description: Hands-free unlocking is the future of smart locks. The best smart home tech removes friction, and having your door unlock for you as you walk up is as frictionless as it gets - no passcodes to remember, no need to have a free hand to wave, press, or poke at the lock. One way to […]

item.title: ICYMI: the 7 biggest tech stories of the week, from the world's techiest e-bike to Apple vs OpenAI drama
item.description: The week's biggest tech news from OnePlus, Apple, Samsung, GoPro and more for July 17, 2026.

item.title: Converting your Android Auto to wireless is easy with an adapter
item.description: Cutting the cord in your car is a simple upgrade.

item.title: En promo, quelle est la meilleure affaire entre le nouveau Samsung Galaxy A27 et le Xiaomi Redmi Note 15 Pro 5G ?
item.description: Faut-il craquer pour le tout récent Samsung Galaxy A27 ou miser sur la fiche technique généreuse du Xiaomi Redmi Note 15 Pro 5G ? Ces deux smartphones milieu de gamme profitent d’une belle promotion. Pour moins de 350 euros, lequel sera le compagnon idéal ?

item.title: Ukraine reveals secret strike squadron of civilian planes transformed into deadly reusable drone bombers that can drop 100Kg bombs 1200 miles deep inside Russia
item.description: Ukraine revealed reusable Horynych bomber drones converted from civilian aircraft following a reported strike against Russian military infrastructure near Crimea.

item.title: Chinese solar company says its new cell has an efficiency of 35.5 percent
item.description: Chinese company LONGi has developed crystalline silicon-perovskite tandem solar cells with a 35.5 percent conversion efficiency.

item.title: Marvel's X-Men movie: cast rumors and everything we know so far about MCU's new mutant-starring comic book film
item.description: Here's everything we know so far about the Marvel Cinematic Universe's first X-Men movie.

item.title: Polling rates explained: do you really need 8,000Hz for keyboards and mice in 2026?
item.description: TechRadar investigates whether you really need an 8,000Hz polling rate for your gaming keyboard or mouse, looks at the pros/cons, professional players, and gives a definitive verdict.
